text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Nnngh... No... Not da sauce!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hwaaargh! Oh... It was just that nightmare again...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
In the dream, I'm on a grill gettin' okonomiyaki
batter thrown all over me!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And then they break out the sauce. I know I'm
done for, but I can't do anythin' but scream!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I scream and scream till it wakes me up... How
many times has this been now? I'm barely gettin'
any sleep.
